fixed.item: 1: event-users uses canonical QueueSpec from event-schemas (relative path dep, local queue-argument literals deleted)
2: event-receiver migrated to GET /api/users/by-identity; deprecated GET /api/users/roles/{role}/emails/{email} removed from event-users (grep across all repos confirmed no remaining callers)
3: absolute file:///Users/... event-schemas refs replaced with relative path ../event-schemas via tool.uv.sources in event-saver, event-booking, event-notifier; uv sync + pytest green in all three

11: simulate_booking.py now sends canonical MeetingUrlCreatedPayload ({email, recipient_role, meeting_url}) per CONTRACT_DECISIONS D5; legacy users-list fallback removed from meeting.url_* normalizer (event-booking already publishes canonical shape)
12: QUEUES_DIGEST.md gained the admin-sourced booking.client_reassigned row + lifecycle section entry, consistent with MESSAGE_CONTRACTS.md and ROUTING_RULES

notes: Test runs after each change: event-users 55 passed, event-receiver 103 passed, event-saver 100 passed, event-booking 88 passed, event-notifier 80 passed; ruff clean everywhere. simulate_booking.py is gitignored in event-receiver, so its payload fix (item 11) lives on disk only and could not be committed; the normalizer fallback removal and tests are committed. Receiver/users docs (API_CONTRACTS, DEPENDENCIES, SERVICE_OVERVIEW, AUDIT, README) updated for the by-identity migration.
